title: Azula
content:
# Azula

Azula is a 3-year-old husky mix dog who loves playing in snow and chasing squirrels. She weighs about 50 pounds.

## Breed

As a husky mix, Azula belongs to a type of dog originally bred for polar regions and sled work. [[entity-husky|Huskies]] are known for their cold-weather tolerance, thick double coats, and energetic nature. They typically have pale blue eyes (though can have brown, green, or heterochromic eyes) and are distinguished by their hardiness.

## Owner

Azula belongs to [[entity-juan|Juan]].

## Personality

- Loves playing in snow
- Enjoys chasing squirrels
summary: 3-year-old husky mix dog who loves playing in snow and chasing squirrels, weighs about 50 pounds
